case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. YASBY TAPIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.
